title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: As climate patterns become increasingly unpredictable, scientists are exploring new ways to understand how ecosystems respond to rapid environmental change. Early models (0) climate behaviour as relatively stable, but recent data shows far greater variability than previously assumed.||One promising approach involves using long‑term monitoring stations to (1) subtle shifts in soil composition, humidity and species distribution. These datasets can (2) researchers to identify early warning signs of ecological stress. However, interpreting such complex information requires tools that can (3) vast amounts of data efficiently.||Artificial intelligence has therefore become a valuable ally. Machine‑learning algorithms can (4) patterns that would otherwise remain hidden. Yet some experts caution that overreliance on automated systems may (5) important contextual knowledge that only field researchers possess.||To address this, many teams now combine digital modelling with on‑site observations, aiming to (6) a more accurate picture of ecosystem dynamics. This hybrid approach has already helped conservationists (7) strategies to protect vulnerable habitats and (8) the long‑term resilience of natural landscapes.

example.explanation: La colocación correcta es “regarded climate behaviour as…”. Las otras no se usan para conceptualizar fenómenos científicos de este modo.

questions.explanation: La expresión es “detect subtle shifts”. Las demás no encajan con procesos de monitorización científica.
“Enable researchers to identify…” es la colocación estándar. Las otras no funcionan con ‘researchers’ en este contexto.
La respuesta es “process vast amounts of data”. Las demás no encajan semánticamente.
“Uncover patterns” es la colocación natural. Las demás no funcionan con ‘patterns’.
La expresión es “overlook contextual knowledge”. Las otras no transmiten la idea de pasar por alto información.
“Derive a more accurate picture” es la colocación correcta. Las otras no encajan con ‘picture’ en sentido metafórico.
“Devise strategies” es la colocación estándar. Las demás no funcionan con ‘strategies’.
“Bolster resilience” es la expresión fija. Las otras no encajan con ‘resilience’.
